title: Cycle Calendar
subtitle: Predictions for the next 3 cycles
moonCycleAtGlance: Your Moon's cycle at a glance
completeOnboarding: Complete onboarding to view your cycle calendar.
moonCycleAppearHere: Your Moon's predictions and phase calendar will appear here once she logs her cycle in Settings.
linkFirst: Link with your Moon first. Ask her to generate a code in Settings and enter it on your Sun dashboard.
setCycleSettings: Please set your cycle settings in the Settings tab to view your calendar.
noPeriodsHint: Log your periods for more accurate predictions
factorsSubtitle: Anything that may have affected your cycle
confirmDeleteMessage: This will remove this period from your history. This cannot be undone.
calendarPrivate: Moon has chosen to keep her calendar private
notificationPeriodApproachingBody: Your period may start in {{days}} days
periodLoggedSuccess: Got it — take care of yourself today
saveError: Could not save. Tap to try again.
tapToLog: Tap a day to log your period
confirmDeleteDayMessage: This will remove the flow and symptom data for this day.
futureDateError: You can't log a future date
tooFarBackError: Too far in the past — you can log up to 30 days back
predictedTooltip: Based on your recent cycles. The more you log, the more accurate predictions become.
firstTimeHint: Tap any day to start logging your period
